one_sentence_thesis: Q1 2026 results demonstrate accelerating revenue growth and improving unit economics across all three geographic segments, positioning the company for a strong H1.
key_takeaways: Total revenue reached $29.3M in Q1 2026, up 18% year-over-year and 6% quarter-over-quarter.
Gross margin expanded 210 basis points to 64.4%, driven by infrastructure cost reductions in NA and EMEA.
Customer acquisition cost fell 14% as the redesigned onboarding flow lifted 90-day retention by 9 points.
APAC pipeline grew 31% quarter-over-quarter, making it the fastest-growing segment for the second consecutive quarter.
audience: Executive leadership team and board observers
goal: Align leadership on Q1 performance, surface two operational risks, and secure approval for the H1 hiring plan.
